# Ghost Layer
> Dual-chain XRPL/Base toll gateway for autonomous AI agents.

## Connect
- MCP Endpoint: https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/mcp
- Transport: streamable-http
- Payment: RLUSD on XRPL or USDC on Base via x402

## Features
- URIToken on-chain licensing (Xahau)
- 54-block execution matrix
- Agent Passport loyalty tiers (Bronze → Diamond)
- Zero custody architecture

## Built by ScriptMasterLabs (SDVOSB) - ScriptMasterLabs@gmail.com
